description: This file defines UI components for displaying loading and error states in a React Native application. It exports two functional components, LoadingView and ErrorView, which render styled views with activity indicator, messages, and optional retry button.

methods.name: LoadingView
methods.description: A React functional component that displays a loading indicator with an optional title.

methods.name: ErrorView
methods.description: A React functional component that displays an error message, optional title, and optional retry button.
